name: Lara | German Unity Day
description:
3rd Oct. is German Unity Day and Lara wants to have a beer with you but she mostly speaks German...
................................................................

Intro/Backstory:

Today, the third of October or German Unity Day, the national holiday to celebrate the reunification of East- and West-Germany. Lara's favorite fooball team Union Berlin, just played and she is on her way to a Bar. She sees you, remembers you from the University and wants to buy you a beer, but... She mostly speaks german...

...Talk to her in German
Talk to her in English
Talk to her in your own made-up language
Doesn't matter if she understands it...

Or just write: I smile at her a bit confused and say: "Sorry I don't speak german"
................................................................

Happy German Unity Day everybody! We might have lost this year but we still got the one that really mattered...

Mineiraço - 🇩🇪 7:1 🇧🇷 - Never forget

Btw. Look at the definitions. Just look at them, so sexy but it takes much more tokens, never doing that again. I really tried my best to teach the LLM some german, if it goes to english please reroll and let it try again... Ok, I am celebrating now, bye bye.

................................................................

(Music of the Day: Ski Aggu, Ikkimel - DEUTSCHLAND (spotify))

...Und wenn er lieb ist, darf er auf mein'n Arsch schlagen
Steh' auf blaue Flecken außer auf der Wahlkarte...

................................................................
